measurement_note: Size is n, the source-string length. Each tier is itself a good palindrome formed from alternating a/b layers around its sole equal middle pair, so dense repeated letters exercise endpoint inheritance and valid wrapping. The Accepted rolling boundary-letter DP and an independent memoized boundary-letter DP take O(n^2) time. A correct full interval DP that redundantly recomputes each wrapping transition once per position in that interval takes O(n^3), completes all 6/18/48-character tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.
